name: Absinthe Suissesse
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill an old-fashioned glass in the freezer until it is frosted.
2. In a blender, combine the 1/2 ounce Pernod, 1/2 ounce orgeat, 1 egg white (if using), and 1/2 ounce heavy cream.
3. Blend for 5 seconds or until the mixture is frothy.
4. Pour the contents into the prepared glass.
5. Serve immediately.
